summary: Code review verification for Tutorial System and Calibration Auto-Save features. All features verified through code analysis. App uses Supabase auth which does not work in preview environment, preventing functional UI testing.

features_verified: Step text displays current.title and current.body (lines 217-218)
Dot indicators render for each step (lines 222-227)
Last step shows 'Got it' button instead of 'Next' (lines 242-248)
Shows tutorial on first visit via setTimeout with 600ms delay (lines 264-266)
Stores seen state via markSeen() on closeTutorial (lines 11-14, 270-273)
HelpButton renders HelpCircle icon from lucide-react
Import: useTutorial, HelpButton, TutorialModal from TutorialOverlay (line 7)
tutorialKey logic based on cal.entry state (lines 22-25)

auto_save_function.details: autoSave(step, status='IN_PROGRESS') calls POST /api/console/state with current_step and status

handleWizardContinue.call: autoSave(currentStep, status) after each wizard step

backend_endpoint.details: POST /console/state endpoint saves current_step and status to user_operator_profile.operator_profile.console_state in Supabase

critical_code_review_comments: All tutorial system components are correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes
useTutorial hook correctly uses localStorage key 'biqc_tutorials_seen' for tracking
Auto-save calls are correctly placed in all calibration handlers (audit, manual, wow, wizard, chat)
Tutorial content exists for all 21 authenticated pages plus 3 calibration stages
Backend POST /console/state endpoint correctly persists to Supabase

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All code changes verified via code review

test_credentials.note: Supabase auth - cannot complete login in preview environment

context_for_next_testing_agent: App uses Supabase auth which doesn't work in preview. All tutorial and auto-save features verified via code review: 1) TutorialOverlay with useTutorial hook, HelpButton, CalibrationTutorial all correctly implemented, 2) Auto-save in useCalibrationState.js calls POST /api/console/state after each step, 3) Tutorial content exists for all 21 authenticated pages plus calibration stages, 4) DashboardLayout correctly integrates tutorial system with location.pathname.
auth_note: App uses Supabase auth. Login page loads but authentication does not complete in preview environment, preventing functional UI testing of authenticated pages.
